prompt_text:
### Demographics: 63-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 4 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Worsening edema and dyspnea over the last 3 months.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~6.2 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Lobeglitazone 0.5mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 58.3 kg; Height 165.5 cm; BMI 21.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 134/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.5%; 9 months ago 7.2%; 6 months ago 7.1%; 3 months ago 7.3%; current 7.2%), FPG (12 months ago 159mg/dL; 9 months ago 150mg/dL; 6 months ago 187mg/dL; 3 months ago 194mg/dL; current 144mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 59.8kg; 9 months ago 54.9kg; 6 months ago 54.8kg; 3 months ago 54.3kg; current 58.3kg), Height (12 months ago 165.5cm; 9 months ago 165.5cm; 6 months ago 165.5cm; 3 months ago 165.5cm; current 165.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 21.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 138mmHg; 9 months ago 136mmHg; 6 months ago 136mmHg; 3 months ago 135mmHg; current 134mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 78mmHg; 9 months ago 78mmHg; 6 months ago 78mmHg; 3 months ago 80mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 27U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 27U/L; 3 months ago 28U/L; current 25U/L), AST (12 months ago 28U/L; 9 months ago 29U/L; 6 months ago 28U/L; 3 months ago 27U/L; current 27U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; current 51mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 287mg/g; 9 months ago 361mg/g; 6 months ago 338mg/g; 3 months ago 227mg/g; current 278mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 75mg/dL; 9 months ago 79mg/dL; 6 months ago 80mg/dL; 3 months ago 76mg/dL; current 77mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 40mg/dL; 9 months ago 39mg/dL; 6 months ago 40mg/dL; 3 months ago 39mg/dL; current 41mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 100mg/dL; 9 months ago 101mg/dL; 6 months ago 119mg/dL; 3 months ago 100mg/dL; current 110mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.9g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 12.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.68 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
